task_completion.description: Read the observation plan to understand the required exposure sequence.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of ~/Documents/hdr_observation_plan.txt.

task_completion.description: Target the globular cluster M15 using the telescope software.
task_completion.visual_evidence: KStars sky map centered on M15, or the Ekos Mount module showing M15 as the active target with coordinates around RA 21.4994h, Dec 12.1669 deg.

task_completion.description: Capture the bracketed exposure sequence in the Luminance filter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Ekos Capture module showing a sequence queue with the Luminance filter (Slot 1) and multiple exposure times, or the FITS viewer displaying captured images of the globular cluster.

task_completion.description: Organize the resulting FITS files into exposure-specific directories.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal window showing subdirectories (e.g., named by exposure time) inside /home/ga/Images/M15_HDR, containing the captured .fits files.

task_completion.description: Generate the requested false-color sky view image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An image viewer displaying a false-color image of the cluster, or a file manager showing the file sky_view_cool.png in /home/ga/Images/M15_HDR.

task_completion.description: Provide a summary log of the observation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the creation or contents of hdr_summary.txt in ~/Documents/.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with KStars/Ekos to capture the images.
integrity.visual_evidence: The KStars/Ekos GUI should be visible in some screenshots, showing active connection to INDI devices and capture progress, rather than just terminal commands mocking the files.

integrity.description: Verify the captured images are genuine FITS files from the simulated environment.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Ekos FITS viewer or another image viewer should display realistic star fields corresponding to a globular cluster, not blank images or downloaded stock photos.

integrity.description: Verify the agent manually organized the files and created the log.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal commands (like mkdir, mv, echo, nano) or file manager interactions should be visible for organizing the FITS files and writing the summary log.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target: M15 (RA 21.4994h, Dec 12.1669 deg). Required Filter: Luminance (Slot 1). Base Output Directory: /home/ga/Images/M15_HDR. Sky View Path: /home/ga/Images/M15_HDR/sky_view_cool.png. Summary Log Path: /home/ga/Documents/hdr_summary.txt. Observation Plan Path: /home/ga/Documents/hdr_observation_plan.txt.
